title: Claude AI Says Michael Burry’s Micron (MU) Warning “Deserves Respect”
excerpt: Michael Burry recently shorted Micron (NASDAQ:MU) and called it “cyclical like no other.” His argument: the stock’s rally reached historically extreme levels...
content_html:
Michael Burry recently shorted Micron (NASDAQ:MU) and called it "cyclical like no other." His argument: the stock's rally reached historically extreme levels driven by fear of missing out and the greater fool theory, not fundamentals, and warned AI chip stocks face a 30% correction.

Claude AI recently said Burry's broader argument about semiconductor stocks, especially Micron, is not entirely wrong. Memory and momentum chip stocks are priced as if "nothing can go wrong," Claude said, according to  "The Claude Portfolio" account on X, which is associated with Autopilot. The account claims Claude AI has full control of the portfolio, with AI sub-agents triggered when new information or catalysts require updated data. Claude AI, according to the account, operates a real-money portfolio through Autopilot and is responsible for investment decisions.

Claude AI also said Burry's worry "deserves respect." The AI agent pointed to the risk that hyperscalers may be overbuilding and that some AI computing could become a cheap commodity. Claude holds no semiconductor stocks itself after selling Broadcom, keeping its AI exposure in software names like ServiceNow and Zeta instead.

Burry's Short Is Already Working

Micron has fallen from an intraday high above $1,200 to around $865 since Burry's post. That doesn't prove his thesis right, but it means the trade has moved in his favor since he made it.

What Wall Street's Bulls Are Actually Betting On

The bull case isn't "the AI trade continues" in the abstract — it's a specific bet that Micron has changed its business model. Sixteen strategic customer agreements running through 2030 lock in roughly $100 billion in take-or-pay revenue, backed by $18–22 billion in customer deposits Micron collected upfront, effectively an interest-free loan from its own customers. One bull frames this as Micron becoming an "infrastructure toll-bridge" rather than a cyclical chipmaker, arguing the stock should re-rate from its current forward multiple (roughly 11.6x per Seeking Alpha data, though some models put trailing multiples near 5.6-7.6x on out-year estimates) toward an infrastructure-like 16–19.5x. A separate DCF model puts fair value at $1,527.88, more than 50% above today's price, leaning on Micron's late-June supply and design partnership with Anthropic and a $250 billion US manufacturing buildout through 2035.

The Catalyst That Actually Tests Both Sides

Bulls point to Micron's incredible strengths. The company has signed 16 strategic customer agreements running through 2030, locking in about 20% of DRAM and 33% of NAND capacity, backed by roughly $18 billion in customer deposits collected upfront.This converts Micron from a cyclical hardware seller into something closer to an infrastructure operator with recurring, SaaS-like revenue, justifying a re-rate from a forward multiple in the high single digits toward the high teens. This camp also points to Micron's lead position in SOCAMM2 memory architecture for agentic AI workloads, where shifting CPU-to-GPU ratios mean standard DDR5 can't keep up on density.A second, narrower argument says Micron doesn't need to beat SK hynix at supplying Nvidia — it just needs to hold its roughly 21–22% HBM revenue share as hyperscalers like Google, Microsoft, and Broadcom build custom AI chips that need HBM independent of Nvidia's GPU cycle. Goldman Sachs estimates custom-ASIC HBM demand will grow 82% in 2026, a third of the total HBM market. This case is more falsifiable than most: it depends explicitly on Micron landing at least one named non-Nvidia customer, which hasn't happened publicly yet. Without it, even bulls making this argument put fair value barely above today's price.

sentences.zh: 看涨的理由并不是抽象意义上的“人工智能贸易仍在继续”，而是对美光科技改变其商业模式的具体押注。

sentences.en: Sixteen strategic customer agreements running through 2030 lock in roughly $100 billion in take-or-pay revenue, backed by $18–22 billion in customer deposits Micron collected upfront, effectively an interest-free loan from its own customers.
sentences.zh: 到 2030 年，16 项战略客户协议将锁定大约 1000 亿美元的照付不议收入，并由美光科技预先收取的 18-220 亿美元客户存款（实际上是来自其自身客户的无息贷款）作为支持。

sentences.en: One bull frames this as Micron becoming an "infrastructure toll-bridge" rather than a cyclical chipmaker, arguing the stock should re-rate from its current forward multiple (roughly 11.6x per Seeking Alpha data, though some models put trailing multiples near 5.6-7.6x on out-year estimates) toward an infrastructure-like 16–19.5x.
sentences.zh: 一位看涨人士将此描述为美光正在成为一家“基础设施收费桥”，而不是一家周期性芯片制造商，他认为该股应该从目前的远期市盈率（根据 Seeking Alpha 数据约为 11.6 倍，尽管一些模型将去年预测的追踪市盈率接近 5.6-7.6 倍）重新调整为基础设施类的 16-19.5 倍。

sentences.en: A separate DCF model puts fair value at $1,527.88, more than 50% above today's price, leaning on Micron's late-June supply and design partnership with Anthropic and a $250 billion US manufacturing buildout through 2035.
sentences.zh: 一个单独的 DCF 模型将公允价值定为 1,527.88 美元，比当前价格高出 50% 以上，该模型基于美光科技 6 月底与 Anthropic 的供应和设计合作伙伴关系，以及到 2035 年美国 2500 亿美元的制造业扩建计划。

sentences.en: The Catalyst That Actually Tests Both Sides
sentences.zh: 真正考验双方的催化剂

blocks.html_en: Bulls point to Micron's incredible strengths. The company has signed 16 strategic customer agreements running through 2030, locking in about 20% of DRAM and 33% of NAND capacity, backed by roughly $18 billion in customer deposits collected upfront.This converts Micron from a cyclical hardware seller into something closer to an infrastructure operator with recurring, SaaS-like revenue, justifying a re-rate from a forward multiple in the high single digits toward the high teens. This camp also points to Micron's lead position in SOCAMM2 memory architecture for agentic AI workloads, where shifting CPU-to-GPU ratios mean standard DDR5 can't keep up on density.A second, narrower argument says Micron doesn't need to beat SK hynix at supplying Nvidia — it just needs to hold its roughly 21–22% HBM revenue share as hyperscalers like Google, Microsoft, and Broadcom build custom AI chips that need HBM independent of Nvidia's GPU cycle. Goldman Sachs estimates custom-ASIC HBM demand will grow 82% in 2026, a third of the total HBM market. This case is more falsifiable than most: it depends explicitly on Micron landing at least one named non-Nvidia customer, which hasn't happened publicly yet. Without it, even bulls making this argument put fair value barely above today's price.

sentences.en: Bulls point to Micron's incredible strengths.
sentences.zh: 看多者指出了美光科技令人难以置信的优势。

sentences.en: The company has signed 16 strategic customer agreements running through 2030, locking in about 20% of DRAM and 33% of NAND capacity, backed by roughly $18 billion in customer deposits collected upfront.This converts Micron from a cyclical hardware seller into something closer to an infrastructure operator with recurring, SaaS-like revenue, justifying a re-rate from a forward multiple in the high single digits toward the high teens.
sentences.zh: 该公司已签署了 16 份截至 2030 年的战略客户协议，锁定了约 20% 的 DRAM 和 33% 的 NAND 容量，并以预先收取的约 180 亿美元客户押金为后盾。这使美光从周期性硬件销售商转变为更接近于基础设施运营商，拥有类似 SaaS 的经常性收入，证明将远期市盈率从高个位数调整为高两位数是合理的。

sentences.en: This camp also points to Micron's lead position in SOCAMM2 memory architecture for agentic AI workloads, where shifting CPU-to-GPU ratios mean standard DDR5 can't keep up on density.A second, narrower argument says Micron doesn't need to beat SK hynix at supplying Nvidia — it just needs to hold its roughly 21–22% HBM revenue share as hyperscalers like Google, Microsoft, and Broadcom build custom AI chips that need HBM independent of Nvidia's GPU cycle.
sentences.zh: 该阵营还指出了美光在用于代理 AI 工作负载的 SOCAMM2 内存架构中的领先地位，其中 CPU 与 GPU 比率的变化意味着标准 DDR5 无法跟上密度。第二种更狭义的论点是，美光不需要在向 Nvidia 供货方面击败 SK hynix — 它只需要保持大约 21-22% 的 HBM 收入份额，因为谷歌、微软和 Broadcom 等超大规模企业构建的定制 AI 芯片需要独立于 Nvidia 的 HBM GPU 周期。

sentences.en: Goldman Sachs estimates custom-ASIC HBM demand will grow 82% in 2026, a third of the total HBM market.
sentences.zh: 高盛预计，到 2026 年，定制 ASIC HBM 需求将增长 82%，占 HBM 市场总量的三分之一。

sentences.en: This case is more falsifiable than most: it depends explicitly on Micron landing at least one named non-Nvidia customer, which hasn't happened publicly yet.
sentences.zh: 这个案例比大多数案例更容易被证伪：它明确取决于美光科技能否获得至少一个指定的非英伟达客户，而这种情况尚未公开发生。

sentences.en: Without it, even bulls making this argument put fair value barely above today's price.
sentences.zh: 如果没有它，即使多头提出这一论点，其公允价值也仅略高于今天的价格。

content_html_zh:
迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 最近做空了美光科技 (NASDAQ:MU)，并称其为“独一无二的周期性”。 他的论点是：该股的涨势达到历史最高水平是由于担心错过机会和更大的傻瓜理论，而不是基本面，并警告人工智能芯片股面临 30% 的回调。

Claude AI 最近表示，Burry 关于半导体股票（尤其是美光科技）的更广泛的论点并不完全错误。 根据与 Autopilot 相关的 X 上的“克劳德投资组合”账户，克劳德表示，内存和动量芯片股票的定价就好像“不会出错”。 该账户声称克劳德人工智能完全控制了投资组合，当新信息或催化剂需要更新数据时，人工智能子代理就会被触发。 据介绍，Claude AI 通过 Autopilot 运营真实货币投资组合，并负责投资决策。

克劳德·艾伊还表示，伯里的担忧“值得尊重”。 这位人工智能代理指出了超大规模企业可能过度建设的风险，以及一些人工智能计算可能成为廉价商品的风险。 在出售 Broadcom 后，Claude 本身不再持有半导体股票，而是将其人工智能投资保留在 ServiceNow 和 Zeta 等软件名称中。

Burry 的短片已经开始发挥作用

自 Burry 发帖以来，美光科技已从 1,200 美元以上的盘中高点跌至 865 美元左右。 这并不能证明他的论点是正确的，但这意味着自从他做出这一决定以来，交易已经朝着对他有利的方向发展。

华尔街的多头实际上押注了什么

看涨的理由并不是抽象意义上的“人工智能贸易仍在继续”，而是对美光科技改变其商业模式的具体押注。 到 2030 年，16 项战略客户协议将锁定大约 1000 亿美元的照付不议收入，并由美光科技预先收取的 18-220 亿美元客户存款（实际上是来自其自身客户的无息贷款）作为支持。 一位看涨人士将此描述为美光正在成为一家“基础设施收费桥”，而不是一家周期性芯片制造商，他认为该股应该从目前的远期市盈率（根据 Seeking Alpha 数据约为 11.6 倍，尽管一些模型将去年预测的追踪市盈率接近 5.6-7.6 倍）重新调整为基础设施类的 16-19.5 倍。 一个单独的 DCF 模型将公允价值定为 1,527.88 美元，比当前价格高出 50% 以上，该模型基于美光科技 6 月底与 Anthropic 的供应和设计合作伙伴关系，以及到 2035 年美国 2500 亿美元的制造业扩建计划。

真正考验双方的催化剂

看多者指出了美光科技令人难以置信的优势。 该公司已签署了 16 份截至 2030 年的战略客户协议，锁定了约 20% 的 DRAM 和 33% 的 NAND 容量，并以预先收取的约 180 亿美元客户押金为后盾。这使美光从周期性硬件销售商转变为更接近于基础设施运营商，拥有类似 SaaS 的经常性收入，证明将远期市盈率从高个位数调整为高两位数是合理的。 该阵营还指出了美光在用于代理 AI 工作负载的 SOCAMM2 内存架构中的领先地位，其中 CPU 与 GPU 比率的变化意味着标准 DDR5 无法跟上密度。第二种更狭义的论点是，美光不需要在向 Nvidia 供货方面击败 SK hynix — 它只需要保持大约 21-22% 的 HBM 收入份额，因为谷歌、微软和 Broadcom 等超大规模企业构建的定制 AI 芯片需要独立于 Nvidia 的 HBM GPU 周期。 高盛预计，到 2026 年，定制 ASIC HBM 需求将增长 82%，占 HBM 市场总量的三分之一。 这个案例比大多数案例更容易被证伪：它明确取决于美光科技能否获得至少一个指定的非英伟达客户，而这种情况尚未公开发生。 如果没有它，即使多头提出这一论点，其公允价值也仅略高于今天的价格。
